info.title: ConvoMem Integration API
info.description: Integration API for external AI agents (voice/chat): capture messages, resolve customers, manage conversations, and ingest/lookup memories.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Organization API key from your dashboard. Prefix: sk-org-...

context.description: Formatted context string ready for LLM injection

tokenCount.description: Estimated token count of the context

post.summary: Capture a message and auto-manage session
post.description: Single endpoint for external integrators. Resolves customer identity, finds or creates an active conversation session, enqueues the message for memory extraction, and returns the session context. No explicit start/end lifecycle calls required. Accepts either a single message string or a full messages array (with user + assistant turns) — one is required.

schema.description: Either `message` or `messages` is required. At least one identity field (`customerId`, `externalId`, `email`, or `phoneNumber`) is required.

message.description: Single user message (simple form). Required if messages not provided.

messages.description: Full conversation turns including assistant replies. Required if message not provided.

customerId.description: Identity field — at least one of customerId, externalId, email, or phoneNumber is required.

externalId.description: Identity field — at least one of customerId, externalId, email, or phoneNumber is required.

email.description: Identity field — at least one of customerId, externalId, email, or phoneNumber is required.

phoneNumber.description: Identity field — at least one of customerId, externalId, email, or phoneNumber is required.

userName.description: Customer display name — used to set or update the customer profile name (backfills placeholder names like phone numbers)

conversationId.description: The conversation session ID (reused across calls for the same customer while session is active)

customerId.description: The resolved or newly created customer ID

status.description: 'new' if a new conversation was started, 'active' if appended to an existing session

isNewConversation.description: true when this call started a new conversation session

isNewCustomer.description: true when the customer was created by this call

get.summary: Lookup customer by identifier with optional semantic memory
get.description:
Find a customer by internal UUID, phone number, email address, or external ID. At least one identity parameter must be provided.

**topic** — When provided, returns semantically relevant memories ranked by vector similarity instead of the 10 most recent. Also returns a pre-formatted `context` string ready to inject into an LLM prompt and a `tokenCount` estimate.

**autoCreate** — When `true`, automatically creates a new customer record if the identifier is not found. The response will include `isNewCustomer: true`. Use `userName` to set the display name for newly created customers.

This is the primary "plug-and-forget" endpoint for bot integrations. A single call resolves identity, creates new customers, and returns relevant memory context — no internal IDs required.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Topic or customer message to find relevant memories for. When provided, memories are ranked by semantic relevance and a pre-formatted context string is returned.

parameters.name: autoCreate
parameters.description: Auto-create customer if not found. Response includes isNewCustomer flag.

200.description: Lookup result with optional semantic memories

isNewCustomer.description: true when customer was auto-created by this call

category.description: Memory category (e.g. preference, customer_profile, purchase_history, pain_point)

memoryType.description: Type of memory (fact, preference, intent, goal)

relevance.description: Semantic similarity score (0-1) — only present when topic is provided

sourceContext.description: Original conversation snippet the memory was extracted from

context.description: Pre-formatted context string for LLM injection (only when topic is provided)

tokenCount.description: Estimated token count of context string (only when topic is provided)

memories.content: Had unresolved billing dispute in February
memories.sourceContext: Customer said: I still haven't received my refund from February

memories.content: Has been a customer for 3 years

value.context:
- Had unresolved billing dispute in February
- Has been a customer for 3 years

get.description:
Synthesizes a customer's full cross-channel journey (chat, email, voice, SMS) into a single briefing for a human agent taking over: a chronological journey timeline, key memories, sentiment trend, open-issue detection, and an AI-written narrative summary.

Identify the customer by internal UUID, phone, email, or external ID — exactly like /customers/lookup. The customer is never auto-created.

**narrative=false** skips the AI-written briefing (fast, structured data only). **fresh=true** bypasses the 10-minute cache.

parameters.name: narrative
parameters.description: When "false", skip the AI narrative (structured data only)

parameters.name: fresh
parameters.description: Bypass the cache and rebuild the briefing

journey.summary: Reported damaged order A-4471; KB article didn't help
Followed up on replacement, no response

example.narrative: Ava first contacted via chat about a damaged espresso machine (order A-4471); the KB article didn't help. She emailed twice with no resolution and is considering canceling her premium plan. She called and was escalated — the open issue is the replacement for order A-4471.

post.description: Create a customer profile for an organization. At least one of email, phone, or externalId must be provided.

400.description: Validation error — at least one identifier required

409.description: Customer with this identifier already exists

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers for the organization.
Retrieve full details for a specific customer by ID.

patch.description: Update one or more fields on an existing customer.

409.description: Conflict — identifier already in use by another customer

delete.description: Permanently delete a customer and all associated data.

post.summary: End a conversation (flat — no path params)
post.description: Same as PATCH /customers/{id}/conversations/{cid} but accepts customerId and conversationId in the request body. Designed for bot platforms that don't support dynamic path parameters or PATCH method.

example.outcome: Booked DXB-LHR business class for March 15

post.summary: Escalate a conversation (flat — no path params)
post.description: Same as PATCH /customers/{id}/conversations/{cid}/escalate but accepts customerId and conversationId in the request body.

get.summary: Cross-channel agent handoff context (by customer ID)
get.description: Same as GET /customers/handoff but addressed by internal customer UUID.

post.summary: Ingest a completed conversation for memory extraction
post.description: Batch import endpoint — enqueue a completed conversation (full message history including both user and assistant turns) for asynchronous memory extraction. Use this for historical imports, CRM sync, or post-processing third-party transcripts. For real-time capture use POST /api/v1/capture instead.

messages.content: I prefer morning deliveries before 9 AM.
Got it! I'll note your preference for morning deliveries.

get.summary: Look up relevant memories for a topic
get.description: Retrieve contextually relevant memories for a given topic, formatted and ready to inject into an LLM prompt. Uses vector similarity search combined with importance and recency scoring.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: The topic or query to find relevant memories for

200.description: Relevant memories formatted for LLM injection

context.description: Pre-formatted context string for LLM prompt injection

tokenCount.description: Total token count of the context string

example.context:
Known about this customer:
- Prefers morning deliveries before 9 AM
- Located in New York

get.summary: Look up relevant memories by identity (no UUID needed)
get.description: Retrieve contextually relevant memories for a topic using phone, email, or external ID to identify the customer — no internal UUID required. Useful for bot integrations that only have a phone number or email.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: The topic or query to find relevant memories for

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Customer phone number (one of phone/email/externalId required)

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Customer email address (one of phone/email/externalId required)

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description: External system identifier (one of phone/email/externalId required)

200.description: Relevant memories formatted for LLM injection

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of stored memories for a customer.

patch.description: Update fields on an existing memory entry.

delete.description: Permanently remove a specific memory entry.

post.description: Begin a new conversation session for a customer.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of conversations for a customer.

patch.description: Mark a conversation as completed with an optional outcome note.
Mark a conversation as escalated, optionally providing a reason.

post.summary: Mint a short-lived embed token for the agent handoff panel
post.description: Your backend calls this with an org API key to mint a read-only, short-lived token pinned to one customer. Pass the token to the embeddable agent panel iframe — it can only read that customer's handoff context, nothing else.

400.description: Validation error — at least one identifier required

get.summary: Fetch handoff context with an embed token (public)
get.description: Token-authenticated endpoint used by the embeddable agent panel. The org and customer identity come from the verified token — no API key or session required.
